home.heroSubtitle: A systematic framework for growth, education, investing, technology, and civilization.
home.introTitle: Life is a long-term systems engineering project.
home.introBody: Through values, responsibility, first-principles thinking, and the integration of models, methods, and tools, this website helps people build a better life across growth, education, investing, technology, and civilization.
home.systemBody: The site is organized around Life OS, first principles, mental models, career, investing, education, technology, society, and civilization.
home.topicsBody: Study a small set of people, companies, and stocks deeply enough to learn how judgment, products, culture, and markets work.

about.title: About Yong Zheng
about.body: I am Yong Zheng, a long-term practitioner and researcher of first-principles thinking and systems thinking. Over the years, I have studied life growth, education, investing, technology, and society, with the goal of building a Life Operating System that ordinary people can actually use.
about.principles: The work here is centered on long-termism, responsibility, clarity, action, and compounding.

books.title: Framework System
books.subtitle: A long-term roadmap of frameworks, books, resources, and practices for the Life Operating System.

articles.title: Articles
articles.subtitle: Essays, notes, models, and methods from the Life OS knowledge base.

topics.peopleSubtitle: Learn strategy, product sense, organization, communication, and long-term judgment from a small set of exceptional builders.
topics.companiesSubtitle: Understand how great companies build products, make money, form culture, and defend competitive advantages.
topics.stocksSubtitle: Understand stocks through companies, business models, financial statements, valuation, and risk.
topics.lifeAdviceSubtitle: Extract transferable advice for personal life and growth systems from the person’s public communication, long-term choices, and organizational practice.
topics.relatedCompaniesSubtitle: Read the person’s strategic map through core company, acquisitions, and investment ecosystem.
topics.timelineSubtitle: Review key company turning points from newest to oldest.
topics.deepQuestionsIntro: Use these questions while studying this section.
topics.notAdvice: This area is for study frameworks and research notes only. It is not investment advice.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: For conversations about Life OS, AI tools, product solutions, knowledge systems, or long-term collaboration, you can reach me here.
contact.note: When adding me on WeChat, please briefly mention why you are reaching out.
